prompt:
Declaration (in builder format):

DistributedRalph
  .workers(Pool
      .agents(count: 6, model: "sonnet-4.6", role: "implementer")
      .agents(count: 1, model: "opus-4.7",  role: "reviewer")
      .max_concurrent_per_repo(2))                        // avoid file-lock thrash
  .backlog(GitBacked
      .source(repo: "github.com/lambda-run/ops", file: "fix_plan.md")
      .claim(strategy: "atomic_branch_lock", ttl: "10m")
      .release(on: ["merge", "abandon", "ttl_expiry"]))
  .protocol(Coordination
      .conflict(resolve: "last_write_wins_after_rebase")
      .escalate(when: "rebase_conflict_3x", to: reviewer_pool)
      .gossip(channel: "slack:#ralph-bus", events: ["claim", "merge", "block"]))
  .loop(Condition
      .continue_while: backlog.has_open_tasks
      .stop_if: [budget.exceeded($50), human.kill_switch, error_rate > 0.3])
  .recovery(OnCrash
      .release_claims(by: dead_worker_id)
      .requeue(task: orphaned, with: "retry_count++")
      .max_retries(3, then: park_for_human))
  .observe(Telemetry
      .log(events: ["claim", "commit", "fail"], to: "loki")
      .metric(success_rate, p50_task_seconds, claim_contention)
      .surface(to: human, when: error_rate > 0.2 || queue_stuck > "30m"))
  .terminate(When
      .backlog_empty
      .or budget_exhausted
      .or human_signals_done)

Output a flat bullet list manifest of every concrete element this declaration implies.
manifest:
- DistributedRalph system
- Worker pool
- 6 implementer agents
- Implementer agent model: sonnet-4.6
- 1 reviewer agent
- Reviewer agent model: opus-4.7
- Maximum concurrent workers per repository: 2
- Git-backed backlog
- Backlog source repository: github.com/lambda-run/ops
- Backlog source file: fix_plan.md
- Backlog claim strategy: atomic_branch_lock
- Backlog claim TTL: 10m
- Release claim on merge
- Release claim on abandon
- Release claim on ttl_expiry
- Coordination protocol
- Conflict resolution strategy: last_write_wins_after_rebase
- Escalate on rebase_conflict_3x
- Escalation target: reviewer_pool
- Gossip channel: slack:#ralph-bus
- Gossip event: claim
- Gossip event: merge
- Gossip event: block
- Loop condition
- Continue while backlog.has_open_tasks
- Stop if budget.exceeded($50)
- Stop if human.kill_switch
- Stop if error_rate > 0.3
- Crash recovery
- On crash, release claims by dead_worker_id
- On crash, requeue orphaned task
- Requeue orphaned task with retry_count++
- Maximum retries: 3
- After maximum retries, park_for_human
- Telemetry observation
- Log event: claim
- Log event: commit
- Log event: fail
- Log destination: loki
- Metric: success_rate
- Metric: p50_task_seconds
- Metric: claim_contention
- Surface telemetry to: human
- Surface telemetry when error_rate > 0.2 || queue_stuck > "30m"
- Terminate when backlog_empty
- Terminate when budget_exhausted
- Terminate when human_signals_done
